rules.title: Sample accepted for sandbox planning
rules.summary: The host accepted a local sample path and created a planning artifact.

rules.title: Hyper-V runbook generated
rules.summary: The host generated a reproducible Hyper-V execution plan for review.

rules.title: R0 collector device unavailable
rules.summary: R0Collector could not open the configured driver device; this records driver health rather than malicious sample behavior.

rules.title: R0 collector start failed
rules.summary: The guest agent could not start the optional R0Collector sidecar; this records collection health rather than malicious sample behavior.

rules.title: R0 collector mock driver event
rules.summary: R0Collector emitted a synthetic driver event for JSONL and Guest Agent plumbing tests.

rules.title: Legacy R0 collector protocol placeholder
rules.summary: A legacy R0Collector build opened the driver device without issuing the read-events IOCTL; current builds should emit driverHealth, driverPoll, and driverReadEvents rows instead.

rules.title: R0 driver health queried
rules.summary: R0Collector successfully queried the KSword sandbox driver health or queue status through DeviceIoControl.

rules.title: R0 driver startup heartbeat observed
rules.summary: The kernel driver emitted a startup heartbeat through the R0 event drain path; current builds use a reserved self-test event and later builds may emit driver.load.

rules.title: Command and scripting interpreter
rules.summary: A process command line references a common Windows scripting interpreter.

rules.title: New process observed after launch
rules.summary: The guest agent observed a process that was not present in the baseline after sample execution started.

rules.title: Registry modification observed
rules.summary: A driver or agent event reported a registry write.

rules.title: Run key persistence
rules.summary: A registry creation or update targeted a Windows Run or RunOnce autostart key.

rules.title: Dropped or modified file
rules.summary: The guest agent observed a file creation or modification during execution.

rules.title: File deletion observed
rules.summary: The guest agent or driver event stream reported a file deletion during execution.

rules.title: Executable or script file written
rules.summary: A file creation or modification event wrote an executable, driver, library, or script-like path.

rules.title: Image load event placeholder
rules.summary: An image-load callback event was ingested; richer image-load classification should be added when R0 payloads are finalized.

rules.title: Outbound TCP activity observed
rules.summary: The guest agent observed a new TCP connection after sample execution.

rules.title: Long execution delay or timeout
rules.summary: The sample exceeded the configured analysis window, which can indicate time-based sandbox evasion or long-running behavior.

rules.title: Known packer or UPX-like PE traits
rules.summary: Static analysis found packer tags such as UPX section names, known packer section markers, or packer strings.

rules.title: High entropy or abnormal PE sections
rules.summary: Static analysis found high-entropy or abnormal PE section traits.

rules.title: Embedded URL discovered in sample
rules.summary: Static analysis extracted at least one URL-like string from the sample.

rules.title: PE import table present
rules.summary: Static analysis parsed at least one PE import descriptor; imported module/API evidence may appear in interesting strings.

rules.title: Suspicious Windows API import or string
rules.summary: Static analysis found imports or API-like strings commonly used for native Windows execution, memory, persistence, network, or anti-analysis behavior.

rules.title: Process injection API imports
rules.summary: Static analysis found imports associated with cross-process memory writes, thread creation, APC injection, or thread-context manipulation.

rules.title: Network or download API imports
rules.summary: Static analysis found WinINet, WinHTTP, URLMon, or Winsock import evidence that can support download or command-and-control behavior.

rules.title: Persistence-capable API imports
rules.summary: Static analysis found registry, service-control, or shell execution API imports that can support persistence changes.

rules.title: Anti-analysis API imports or strings
rules.summary: Static analysis found debugger or timing API imports/strings commonly used in sandbox or debugger checks.

rules.title: TLS directory or callback pointer present
rules.summary: Static analysis found a PE TLS directory or callback pointer, which can execute code before the main entry point and is useful to triage for packing or evasion.

rules.title: PE export table present
rules.summary: Static analysis parsed a PE export directory; exported names may appear in interesting strings for DLL triage.

rules.title: COM registration export entry point
rules.summary: Static analysis found DllRegisterServer, DllUnregisterServer, or DllInstall exports that may be invoked through regsvr32-style execution.

rules.title: Service-style export entry point
rules.summary: Static analysis found service-oriented export names such as ServiceMain, useful for DLL/service triage.
